functions.label: Register Iris Wallet
functions.description: Verify your World ID proof and register your wallet. This links your unique identity to your wallet address. One iris = one wallet.

parameters.name: nullifierHash
parameters.label: Nullifier Hash
parameters.description: Your unique World ID nullifier (prevents double registration)

parameters.name: proof
parameters.label: ZK Proof
parameters.description: Zero-knowledge proof of your World ID
